use_cases: Primary action trigger in forms and applications
Navigation links with styled button appearance
Toolbar and action bar interactive elements
Icon or icon-only button for compact UI areas
ai_summary: A reusable Button component built with Radix UI Slot for composition, CVA for variant styling, and Tailwind CSS for layout. Supports multiple variants (default, destructive, outline, secondary, ghost, link) and sizes (default, sm, lg, icon) with accessibility-focused focus-visible states and disabled handling. Designed as an atomic UI primitive that integrates seamlessly into any design system or application.
